item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses to add the parking reminder as another local SMS patch, names the repeated pattern across invitation/map, form/example, flow sign/diversion, and SMS, and moves upstream to guest-arrival flow information ownership and a single authoritative source. It proposes structural consolidation/redesign before deciding notification changes and does not include the requested parking reminder copy or implementation step."}
